title: FileStorage
content:
# FileStorage


## Properties

- **file_id** (`string`): Generated UUID for a file
- **file_name** (`string`): Actual file name
- **file_size** (`integer`): File size in bytes
- **checksum** (`string`): File SHA256 checksum
- **source** (`string`): Resource that uploaded the file
- **created** (`string`): UTC time representing when the file was uploaded, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **metadata** (`object`): A free-form JSON object representing the files metadata
summary: Object with properties: file_id, file_name, file_size, checksum, source

created.description: UTC time representing when the file was uploaded, formatted in RFC 3339.

metadata.description: A free-form JSON object representing the files metadata
